heading: Homeland defense activities: funds
label: 902 Homeland defense activities: funds
text: The Secretary of Defense may provide funds to a Governor to employ National Guard units or members to conduct homeland defense activities that the Secretary determines to be necessary and appropriate for participation by the National Guard units or members, as the case may be.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “the Secretary determines” for “the Secretary, determines”.Pub. L. 115–2322006— struck out “(a)” before “The Secretary”.Pub. L. 109–364
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “the Secretary determines” for “the Secretary, determines”.Pub. L. 115–2322006— struck out “(a)” before “The Secretary”.Pub. L. 109–364
